what_it_does: Open-source Tripo/Stability model for rapid feed-forward 3D reconstruction from one image.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance as a fast baseline for turning a Morgan concept image into a 3D mesh.
possible_use: Quickly prototype image-to-3D avatar mesh generation before applying rigging/skinning steps.
important_notes: Very fast reconstruction but not an animation rig; output likely needs cleanup/rigging.
